_doc.purpose: Short looping idle animation (ambient motion) via AnimateDiff.
_doc.how: ADE_AnimateDiffLoaderGen1 patches the model with the motion module; a uniform context with closed_loop makes the batch loop seamlessly; KSampler renders all frames; VHS_VideoCombine writes a GIF.
_doc.requires: The 'animate' feature pack (capabilities.py): ComfyUI-AnimateDiff-Evolved + ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite nodes + mm_sd_v15_v2.ckpt motion module.
_doc.vram: MEASURED peak (RTX 2080, lowvram): 16f@512=6.4GB, 8f@512=5.2GB, 8f@384=4.7GB. All exceed 4GB, so on a 4GB card AnimateDiff runs via lowvram paging to system RAM (works but slow). Keep frames low and size <=384 on 4GB.
_doc.injected_by_gen_py: 4 ckpt_name; 6/7 prompt; 5 width/height/batch_size(frames); 51 context_length (match frames); 3 seed/steps/cfg; 60 frame_rate.
_doc.verified: Ran end-to-end; produced a looping GIF.
